LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANTS PROSPER FUNDING LLC, AND PROSPER MARKETPLACE, INC.'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 5, 2015 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE PLAINTIFF THE OPPORTUNITY TO RESPOND TO DEFENDANTS' ARGUMENTS IN REPLY THAT THE SECOND SERVICE ATTEMPT WAS ALSO INSUFFICIENT. PLAINTIFF MAY FILE AND SERVE A SURREPLY NO MORE THAN 10 PAGES UP TO FIVE COURT DAYS BEFORE THE NEW HEARING DATE. PLAINTIFF MUST DELIVER A COURTESY COPY OF THE SURREPLY TO DEPT. 302 ON THE DATE OF FILING. JUDGE ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK FELICIA GREEN (302/EHG)
SURREPLY TO DEFENDANTS MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS (TRANSACTION ID # 57309219) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPSFAB LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

LAW AND MOTION 302, SPECIALLY APPEARING DEFENDANTS PROSPER FUNDING LLC AND PROSPER MARKETPLACE, INC'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF PROPERLY EFFECTUATED SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON APRIL 9, 2015. THE PROOF OF SERVICE EVIDENCES COMPLIANCE WITH CCP SEC. 415.20(A). THERE IS NO REQUIREMENT THAT PLAINTIFF PROVE THAT DEFENDANT ACTUALLY RECEIVED THE MAILED DOCUMENTS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. THE PARTIES MAY PRESENT THEIR STIPULATION FOR A 60 DAYS PERIOD TO RESPOND TO THE COMPLAINT THROUGH THE EX-PARTE CALENDAR. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO CSR # 7489

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Jun-05-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ANN M. KARIUKI, TEL. NO. (510) 220-0733 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. SPECIALLY APPEARING DEFENDANTS PROSPER FUNDING LLC and PROSPER MARKETPLACE, INC'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is Denied. Plaintiff properly effectuated substitute service on April 9, 2015. The proof of service evidences compliance with CCP sec. 415.20(a). There is no requirement that Plaintiff prove that Defendant actually received the mailed documents. Order signed in open court. The parties may present their stipulation for a 60 days period to respond to the complaint through the ex-parte calendar. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Melanie Gheno CSR # 7489

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar May-27-2015 Continued To Jun-05-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS PROSPER FUNDING LLC, AND PROSPER MARKETPLACE, INC.'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is continued to June 5, 2015 to give Plaintiff the opportunity to respond to Defendants' arguments in reply that the second service attempt was also insufficient. Plaintiff may file and serve a surreply no more than 10 pages up to five court days before the new hearing date. Plaintiff must deliver a courtesy copy of the surreply to Dept. 302 on the date of filing. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2015 Continued To Jul-15-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
